message:
test(fwc): add 30 auth verify/profiles, confusion recovery, and invariant suite tests

Auth verify/test/refresh/rotate/revoke/repair (8 tests, bead 1g7z0.27.3):
valid/expired credential verify, connectivity test, unimplemented
subcommand routing for refresh/rotate/revoke/repair
Auth profiles/accounts/zones (7 tests, bead 1g7z0.27.4): profile list,
switch, create, default account, zone/workspace scoped credentials,
active marker
Confusion recovery scoring (8 tests, bead 1g7z0.26.4): typo correction
confidence, ambiguous candidates, no-match, dangerous vs safe auto-
correction, help coverage, structured error invariants
Invariant suite (7 tests, bead 1g7z0.18.4): config redaction, auth
credential masking, token budget truncation, exit code semantics,
JSON status field invariant

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
